history.summary: With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (Hurst), z-score -2..1, 120-240s TTC, BB normal state, dead volume, strong ADX trend, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD, and range middle/bottom show confirmed positive EV (win-rates 0.64-0.83, n>=12, consistent after costs). UP signals, >=240s holds, active volume, mixed MTF, and buy-pressure CVD remain marginal or negative. Overall book is barely positive due to selectivity but patterns are still low-sample.

With n=53 settled trades the bot shows modest positive EV (overall wr 0.60, avg_ev_after_cost 0.116) driven by a handful of repeatable regimes; DOWN_STRONG, trending/Hurst, normal BB, bearish-aligned MTF, sell-pressure CVD and 120-240s TTC buckets all clear n>=8, wr comfortably above plausible breakeven and positive realized pnl. Most other slices remain too small or mixed to confirm.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes (n=50), normal BB state (n=16), 120-240s TTC (n=26), bearish MTF alignment (n=12), and sell-pressure CVD (n=19) show confirmed positive EV (win-rates 0.64-0.83, all n>=8) while UP signals and >=240s TTC remain negative. Many other buckets remain below n=8 threshold and are ignored as noise. Overall edge is modest but directionally consistent with selectivity toward DOWN/trending setups.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, sell_pressure CVD, bearish MTF alignment, and strong ADX show win-rates 0.65-0.83 with positive EV after costs and n>=12; these patterns are now confirmed above breakeven. UP signals, active volume, expansion/squeeze BB, and >=240s TTC remain unprofitable or marginal despite decent win-rates in some buckets. Overall sample still small and concentrated in low-spread/trending conditions, so selectivity remains key.

With n=53 settled trades, confirmed positive EV patterns (win-rate above breakeven, positive avg_ev_after_cost) appear in DOWN_STRONG signals, trending Hurst, z-score -2..1, ttc 120-240s, BB normal, ADX strong_trend, bearish_aligned MTF, sell_pressure CVD, and range_middle; UP signals and long ttc show mixed-to-negative results. Many buckets remain too small (n<8) or inconsistent for confirmation. Overall slight positive pnl but selectivity is extremely high (53/35243).

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, bearish MTF alignment, and sell_pressure CVD show confirmed positive EV (wr 0.65-0.83, ev>0.11 after costs, n>=12). history.summary: With n=53 total settled trades the bot shows modest positive EV (0.116) and 60% WR overall, driven primarily by DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes; most other buckets remain too small or mixed to confirm. UP direction, long TTC, active volume and mixed MTF alignment are failing or noisy.

Most other slices remain below n=8 or show negative PnL and are therefore noise. Sample is still tiny so all edges are fragile.
